sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112108" key="forhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φορ-ητικός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n112108.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing motion,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φ. αἰθέριος οὐσία</foreign> Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4029.tlg001:p.149" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.149</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
